name: postman-repo-sync-action
description: Public open-alpha Postman repo sync GitHub Action.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs
scripts.check:dist: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist/index.cjs
